mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shops ( name, business_number, address, phone, email, latitude, longitude, operating_hours, description, rating, total_reviews, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{businessNumber}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{operatingHours}, #{description}, #{rating}, #{totalReviews}, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, business_number, address, phone, email, latitude, longitude, operating_hours, description, rating, total_reviews, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM shops WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, name, business_number, address, phone, email, latitude, longitude, operating_hours, description, rating, total_reviews, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM shops WHERE business_number = #{businessNumber} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, name, business_number, address, phone, email, latitude, longitude, operating_hours, description, rating, total_reviews, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM shops WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, name, business_number, address, phone, email, latitude, longitude, operating_hours, description, rating, total_reviews, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM shops WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY rating DESC, total_reviews DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, name, business_number, address, phone, email, latitude, longitude, operating_hours, description, rating, total_reviews, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM shops WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY rating DESC, total_reviews DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, name, business_number, address, phone, email, latitude, longitude, operating_hours, description, rating, total_reviews, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, (6371 * acos(cos(radians(#{latitude})) * cos(radians(latitude)) * cos(radians(longitude) - radians(#{longitude})) + sin(radians(#{latitude})) * sin(radians(latitude)))) AS distance FROM shops WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (6371 * acos(cos(radians(#{latitude})) * cos(radians(latitude)) * cos(radians(longitude) - radians(#{longitude})) + sin(radians(#{latitude})) * sin(radians(latitude)))) <= #{radiusKm} ORDER BY distance ASC, rating DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}

SELECT id, name, business_number, address, phone, email, latitude, longitude, operating_hours, description, rating, total_reviews, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM shops WHERE rating >= #{minRating} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY rating DESC, total_reviews DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE shops SET name = #{name}, business_number = #{businessNumber}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, operating_hours = #{operatingHours}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE shops SET rating = #{rating}, total_reviews = #{totalReviews}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE shops SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shops WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shops WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shops WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (6371 * acos(cos(radians(#{latitude})) * cos(radians(latitude)) * cos(radians(longitude) - radians(#{longitude})) + sin(radians(#{latitude})) * sin(radians(latitude)))) <= #{radiusKm}
